# model-provider

Single source of truth for `ConversationModel` — the type, Zod schema, default, and a registry mapping each model to its pinned Claude CLI flag and display metadata.

Consumers import directly from `@plugins/conversations/plugins/model-provider/shared`. There are no re-exports through parent barrels.

To switch Opus versions: change `cliFlag` in `shared/registry.ts`.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Registry mapping logical ConversationModel IDs to pinned Claude CLI flags and display metadata. Registry mapping logical ConversationModel IDs to pinned Claude CLI flags and display metadata.
- Exports (core):
  - Types: `ConversationModel`, `ModelMeta`
  - Values: `ConversationModelSchema`, `DEFAULT_MODEL`, `MODEL_REGISTRY`
